title: scutellaria suffrutescens
intro: Scutellaria suffrutescens, also known as Chinese skullcap, is a perennial plant that belongs to the mint family and is native to China. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria suffrutescens include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Scutellaria suffrutescens can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
